overall.description: First-person perspective walking down a wet urban commercial street at night in a video game environment (resembling GTA V). The scene features illuminated storefronts, street trees, and reflective wet pavement under artificial street lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street sidewalk with illuminated storefronts

events.description: dark sedan drives past on the street from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk past commercial buildings and a For Lease sign

wooden signboard with red text advertising commercial space for lease
mature deciduous tree with dense green canopy overhanging the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wet commercial street at night, passing a brick building with a prominent For Lease sign on the left. A dark sedan drives by on the right at moderate speed, its headlights reflecting off the wet asphalt. The sidewalk is lined with mature street trees and utility poles, while illuminated storefronts line the opposite side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching street intersection with utility infrastructure

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past electrical infrastructure while approaching distant pedestrians

notable_agents.action: small group of pedestrians walking toward the camera on the distant sidewalk

entered.detail: large grey metal electrical cabinet with ventilation grates on the sidewalk
bright yellow fire hydrant positioned near the curb

segments.scene_description: Continuing past a large electrical utility box and bright yellow fire hydrant on the left sidewalk. The initial brick building and For Lease sign recede behind as the camera approaches a distant intersection. The commercial buildings on the right remain prominent, and a small group of pedestrians becomes visible walking in the distance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk down a rain-slicked commercial street at night, moving from a quiet stretch of storefronts toward a distant, populated intersection. It begins by passing a brick building with a prominent For Lease sign on the left, while a dark sedan glides by on the right with headlights reflecting off the wet asphalt. As the camera advances past mature street trees and utility poles, the initial brick building recedes into the background. The scene then shifts focus toward the sidewalk's edge, passing a large electrical utility box and a bright yellow fire hydrant. Finally, the perspective opens up toward the road ahead, where the illuminated commercial buildings on the right remain prominent as a small group of pedestrians appears in the distance.
